changes.description: Never-reassigned config (name, symbol, claimFeeBps, maxStakers, owner, bonusRateBps) → constant/immutable; reads come from bytecode, not storage.
require(cond, "long string") → custom errors (4-byte selector revert).
Hoist totalAllocated/totalStaked and rewardRateBps out of loops; reuse a storage pointer per item.
isRecipient/isStaker return the O(1) mapping lookup instead of an O(n) array scan.
setAllocations/batchStake array params memory → calldata (skips the ABI-decode copy).
public → external on functions never called internally.
Cache array length, unchecked {++i}, named returns, drop zero-init and == true/false comparisons.

message: Optimized with Claude into optimized/ (Level 1 — fast pass, Foundry verification skipped). Originals under src/ are unchanged.
